summary: Verified code-review fixes for KOSTIN. All targeted areas verified: (1) /app/backend/tests/ contains no hardcoded-secret files (only __pycache__); (2) /api/health returns healthy; (3) Hero.jsx now uses slide.image as React keys (lines 65, 98); (4) Empty catch blocks in analytics.js, recentlyViewed.js, AuthContext.jsx, CheckoutSuccess.jsx, OrderSuccess.jsx replaced with named/commented handlers; (5) Homepage loads with Hero + 2 slide indicators rendered; (6) /products page loads with products; (7) Admin login via /auth works end-to-end - /api/auth/me returns 200 after login with admin credentials.
critical_code_review_comments: Empty catch blocks were replaced with comment-only bodies (e.g., `catch { /* silent fail */ }`). This technically satisfies lint rules and documents intent but does NOT log to console.warn as claimed in the review context. If observability of silent failures is desired, add console.warn.
AuthContext.jsx is large (270+ lines) with many similar try/catch JSON-parse blocks - consider extracting a safeParseJson helper to reduce duplication.

The `/login` route does not exist in the SPA router; login is served at `/auth`. Any external references (SEO, emails, docs) pointing to /login would 404-in-app (currently just shows 'No routes matched'). Consider adding a redirect from /login to /auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code-review fix verification only. Full regression not performed. Login route is /auth (not /login). Cookie banner appears on first visit and may overlay footer content.
